meta.name: dotnet-maui
meta.title: Dotnet Maui Skill
meta.description: .NET MAUI component and application patterns Triggers on: **/*.xaml, **/*.cs

original_definition.skill_description: .NET MAUI component and application patterns Triggers on: **/*.xaml, **/*.cs

actions.name: Write idiomatic and efficient .NET MAUI and C# code.
actions.description: Write idiomatic and efficient .NET MAUI and C# code.

actions.name: Use async/await for I/O and long-running work to keep the UI
actions.description: Use async/await for I/O and long-running work to keep the UI responsive.

actions.name: Register routes with `Routing.RegisterRoute(...)` and naviga
actions.description: Register routes with `Routing.RegisterRoute(...)` and navigate with `Shell.Current.GoToAsync(...)`.

actions.name: Implement proper error handling for .NET MAUI pages and API
actions.description: Implement proper error handling for .NET MAUI pages and API calls.

actions.name: Implement validation using FluentValidation or DataAnnotatio
actions.description: Implement validation using FluentValidation or DataAnnotations in forms.

actions.name: Prefer compiled bindings for performance and correctness.
actions.description: Prefer compiled bindings for performance and correctness.

actions.name: Update UI from background work using `Dispatcher.Dispatch()`
actions.description: Update UI from background work using `Dispatcher.Dispatch()` or `Dispatcher.DispatchAsync()`:

actions.name: Use `MainThread.BeginInvokeOnMainThread(...)` as a fallback
actions.description: Use `MainThread.BeginInvokeOnMainThread(...)` as a fallback only when no Dispatcher is available.

actions.name: Test components and services using xUnit, NUnit, or MSTest.
actions.description: Test components and services using xUnit, NUnit, or MSTest.

actions.name: Use Moq or NSubstitute for mocking dependencies during tests
actions.description: Use Moq or NSubstitute for mocking dependencies during tests.

actions.name: Implement Authentication and Authorization in the MAUI app w
actions.description: Implement Authentication and Authorization in the MAUI app where necessary using OAuth or JWT tokens for API authentication.

actions.name: Testing only on emulators misses real-device edge cases; tes
actions.description: Testing only on emulators misses real-device edge cases; test on physical devices.

rules.description: NEVER use TableView (deprecated). Prefer CollectionView or layouts such as Grid/VerticalStackLayout.
NEVER use Frame (deprecated). Use Border instead.
NEVER use `*AndExpand` layout options (deprecated). Use Grid and explicit sizing instead.
NEVER place ScrollView or CollectionView inside StackLayout/VerticalStackLayout/HorizontalStackLayout (can break scrolling and virtualization). Use Gr
NEVER reference images as `.svg` at runtime. Use PNG/JPG resources.
NEVER mix Shell navigation with NavigationPage/TabbedPage/FlyoutPage.
NEVER set `BackgroundColor`; use `Background` (supports gradients/brushes and is the preferred modern API).
Set `MainPage` once at startup; avoid changing it frequently.

directives.description: Keep UI (Views) focused on layout and bindings; keep logic in ViewModels and services.
Follow PascalCase for component names, method names, and public members.
Use camelCase for private fields and local variables.
Utilize .NET MAUI's built-in features for component lifecycle (e.g. OnAppearing, OnDisappearing).
Use data binding effectively with `{Binding}` and MVVM patterns.
Structure .NET MAUI components and services following Separation of Concerns.
Use the language version supported by the repo's target .NET SDK and settings; avoid requiring preview language features unless the project is already
Use `BindableLayout` for small, non-scrollable lists (≤20 items). Use `CollectionView` for larger or scrollable lists.
